description: In the Code_Saturne GUI, change the turbulence model for the T-junction simulation case. The GUI is already open with the setup.xml file loaded for a T-junction pipe flow case (downcomer.med mesh). The current turbulence model is set to 'k-epsilon Linear Production'. Navigate to 'Calculation features' > 'Turbulence models' in the left tree panel. Click the turbulence model dropdown and change the selection from 'k-epsilon Linear Production' to 'k-omega SST'. After making this change, save the file using Ctrl+S or File > Save.
